title: Mixed Reading Fun
description: A mixed reading challenge with both fill-in-blank and spell-word modes.
author: Freya Stories

pages.text:
Mixed Reading Fun

An Adventure in Words
Once upon a time there was a brave little fox.
The fox loved to explore the deep forest.
The stars twinkled brightly above the sleeping forest.
The brave fox went home feeling happy and proud.
What a wonderful adventure with words! You are a reading champion!

localizedTitle.ja: ミックスリーディングファン

localizedDescription.en: A mixed reading challenge with both fill-in-blank and spell-word modes.
localizedDescription.pl: Mieszane wyzwanie czytelnicze z trybami uzupełniania luk i literowania.
localizedDescription.es: Un desafío de lectura mixto con modos de rellenar espacios y deletrear palabras.
localizedDescription.de: Eine gemischte Leseherausforderung mit Lückentext- und Buchstabiermodus.
localizedDescription.fr: Un défi de lecture mixte avec des modes de remplissage et d'épellation.
localizedDescription.it: Una sfida di lettura mista con modalità di riempimento e compitazione.
localizedDescription.pt: Um desafio de leitura misto com modos de preenchimento e soletração.
localizedDescription.ja: 穴埋めとスペリングモードを備えたミックスリーディングチャレンジ。
localizedDescription.ar: تحدي قراءة مختلط مع أوضاع ملء الفراغات وتهجئة الكلمات.
localizedDescription.tr: Boşluk doldurma ve kelime heceleme modlarıyla karışık bir okuma mücadelesi.
localizedDescription.nl: Een gemengde leesuitdaging met invul- en spelmodi.
localizedDescription.da: En blandet læseudfordring med udfyldnings- og stavetilstande.
localizedDescription.la: Provocatio lecturae mixta cum modis implendi et litterandi.
localizedDescription.zh: 一个混合阅读挑战，包含填空和拼写模式。
